segments.original_text: ちょっと問題視されつつあるか

segments.text: Even if you go for it, you're still in a bad spot
segments.original_text: 作ってもダイヤなんですよね

segments.text: So there's really no reason to try it here?
segments.original_text: ここで作る選択肢だけはないって感じですか

segments.text: Yeah, you don't want to risk it
segments.original_text: 作りたくないですよね

segments.text: Fair came in and caught them!
segments.original_text: 空前で捉えに来ました

full_text: This is becoming an issue Yeah Even if you go for it, you're still in a bad spot So there's really no reason to try it here? Right Yeah, you don't want to risk it Fair came in and caught them!

corrections.original: クルチュマへ捉えに来ました
corrections.corrected: 空前で捉えに来ました
